name: Cutting Board Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. You will need a large cutting board.
2. On the cutting board, chop the garlic.
3. Chop the chiles (jalapeno or bird chiles).
4. Add parsley and mint to the chopping area.
5. Continue to chop all ingredients together.
6. Slice the tomatoes and add them to the mixture.
7. Mix the salsa by turning it with the flat of your knife or cleaver.
8. Incorporate the salt into the salsa.
9. Once all ingredients are well-chopped, transfer the salsa to a small attractive bowl.
10. Stir in the lemon juice.
Yield: approximately 2 cups
